main_strength: The report correctly identifies key data trends and uses derived signals (e.g., real policy rate, yield curve spread) to interpret the macroeconomic environment.
main_weakness: The interpretation of the risk snapshot is overly simplistic and doesn't adequately acknowledge the limitations of using the S&P 500 as a proxy for market risk.
revision_advice: Expand on the limitations of the risk snapshot and provide a more nuanced discussion of the potential for market volatility, referencing the VIX regime heuristic.
